question:
Consider the following statements with regard to National Technology Day :

1. It commemorates the momentous events of 11th May 1998, when India conducted successful nuclear tests under Operation Shakti

2. The official theme for National Technology Day 2025 is ‘School  to Startups — Igniting Young Minds to Innovate’

Which of the statements given above is/are correct ?

en.content:
Consider the following statements with regard to National Technology Day :

1. It commemorates the momentous events of 11th May 1998, when India conducted successful nuclear tests under Operation Shakti

2. The official theme for National Technology Day 2025 is ‘School  to Startups — Igniting Young Minds to Innovate’

Which of the statements given above is/are correct ?
en.explanation:
Statement 1

"It commemorates the momentous events of 11th May 1998, when India conducted successful nuclear tests under Operation Shakti."

  • National Technology Day is observed every year on 11th May in India.

  • On this day in 1998, India successfully carried out nuclear tests at Pokhran, Rajasthan, known as Pokhran-II or Operation Shakti, under the leadership of then Prime Minister Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee.

  • On the same day, India also successfully test-fired the Hansa-3 aircraft and the Trishul missile.

  • Recognising these achievements, Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee declared 11th May as National Technology Day.

Hence, Statement 1 is correct.

Statement 2

"The official theme for National Technology Day 2025 is 'School to Startups — Igniting Young Minds to Innovate.'"

  • The theme "From Schools to Startups: Igniting Young Minds to Innovate" was actually the theme for National Technology Day 2024, not 2025.

  • Therefore, the theme mentioned here has been wrongly attributed to the year 2025.

Hence, Statement 2 is incorrect.

Correct Answer

Option 1: 1 only

Quick Recap

  • Date: 11th May (every year)

  • First observed: 1999

  • Commemorates: Pokhran-II nuclear tests (Operation Shakti), Hansa-3 test flight, and Trishul missile test — all in 1998.

  • Nodal Agency: Technology Development Board (TDB), under the Department of Science and Technology.

राष्ट्रीय प्रौद्योगिकी दिवस के संबंध में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार कीजिए:

1. यह 11 मई 1998 की महत्वपूर्ण घटनाओं का स्मरण दिलाता है, जब भारत ने ऑपरेशन शक्ति के अंतर्गत सफल परमाणु परीक्षण किए थे

en.content: Which one among the following is NOT included in the National Food Security Mission Commercial Crops (NFSM-CC)?
en.explanation:
The National Food Security Mission – Commercial Crops (NFSM-CC) component targets only a few key commercial crops:

• Cotton

• Jute

• Sugarcane

Since coffee isn’t part of this list, the crop NOT included in NFSM-CC is:

Option 2: Coffee

question:
Consider the following statements with regard to a steel plant:
I. It was setup in 1964 with Russian collaboration
II. It receives iron ore from the Rourkela region
III. Water and Hydel power is supplied by the Damodar Valley Corporation
Identify the Steel Plant on the basis of the above facts:

en.content:
Consider the following statements with regard to a steel plant:
I. It was setup in 1964 with Russian collaboration
II. It receives iron ore from the Rourkela region
III. Water and Hydel power is supplied by the Damodar Valley Corporation
Identify the Steel Plant on the basis of the above facts:
en.explanation:
The correct steel plant, based on the provided facts, is the Bhilai Steel Plant.

Key Points

Bhilai Steel Plant: Established in 1955 through collaboration with the Soviet Union, it is located in Chhattisgarh.

Iron Ore Supply: This plant sources its iron ore primarily from the Dalli-Rajhara mines, not the Rourkela region.

Product Specialization: It is renowned for producing rails for the Indian Railways along with a variety of steel products.

Energy Supply: The Damodar Valley Corporation provides water and hydel power to the plant.

Impact: Bhilai Steel Plant has significantly contributed to making India a self-reliant producer of steel and played a pivotal role in the country's industrial advancement.

Additional Information

Damodar Valley Corporation (DVC):

A government entity established in 1948.

Provides hydel and thermal power to eastern Indian industries and municipalities.

Manages multiple dams, reservoirs, and power plants in the Damodar River basin.

Steel Plants in India:

Major steel plants include Bhilai, Bokaro, Rourkela, and Durgapur.

Each plant is known for distinctive collaborations and specific sources for raw materials and energy.

Russian Collaboration in Indian Steel Industry:

The Soviet Union significantly contributed to India's steel industry, including the Bhilai and Bokaro plants.

Marked a landmark in Indo-Soviet relations during the mid-20th century.

Indian Steel Industry Overview:

India stands as one of the largest steel producers globally, with a comprehensive network of integrated and mini steel plants.

The industry is vital for infrastructure development and economic growth.

hi.content:
एक इस्पात संयंत्र के संबंध में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार कीजिए :
I. इसे रूस के सहयोग से 1964 में स्थापित किया गया था
II. यह राजखेल क्षेत्र से लोह अयस्क प्राप्त करता है
III. जल आपूर्ति और जल-विद्युत की आपूर्ति दामोदर घाटी निगम द्वारा की जाती है
उपयुक्त तथ्यों के आधार पर इस्पात संयंत्र को चिह्नित कीजिए :
hi.explanation:
प्रदान की गई तथ्यों के आधार पर, सही इस्पात संयंत्र भिलाई इस्पात संयंत्र है।

मुख्य बिंदु

भिलाई इस्पात संयंत्र: यह 1955 में सोवियत संघ के सहयोग से स्थापित किया गया था और यह छत्तीसगढ़ में स्थित है।

लोहा अयस्क की आपूर्ति: इस संयंत्र को मुख्य रूप से डल्लीराजहरा खानों से लोहा अयस्क प्राप्त होता है, न कि राउरकेला क्षेत्र से।

उत्पाद विशेषीकरण: यह संयंत्र भारतीय रेल के लिए रेल पटरी (रेल) सहित विभिन्न प्रकार के इस्पात उत्पादों के निर्माण के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।

ऊर्जा आपूर्ति: संयंत्र को जल और पनबिजली की आपूर्ति दामोदर घाटी निगम द्वारा की जाती है।

प्रभाव: भिलाई इस्पात संयंत्र ने भारत को इस्पात के क्षेत्र में आत्मनिर्भर बनाने और देश के औद्योगिक विकास में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाई है।

अतिरिक्त जानकारी

दामोदर घाटी निगम (DVC):

यह एक सरकारी संस्था है, जिसकी स्थापना 1948 में हुई थी।

यह पुरवोत्तर भारत के औद्योगिक क्षेत्रों और नगरपालिकाओं को पनबिजली और तापीय शक्ति प्रदान करती है।

यह दामोदर नदी घाटी में कई बांधों, जलाशयों और विद्युत संयंत्रों का प्रबंधन करती है।

भारत में प्रमुख इस्पात संयंत्र:

मुख्य इस्पात संयंत्रों में भिलाई, बोकारो, राउरकेला और दुर्गापुर शामिल हैं।

प्रत्येक संयंत्र अपनी विशिष्ट अंतरराष्ट्रीय सहयोग एवं कच्चे माल और ऊर्जा के स्रोतों के लिए जाना जाता है।

भारतीय इस्पात उद्योग में रूसी सहयोग:

सोवियत संघ ने भारत के इस्पात उद्योग जैसे भिलाई एवं बोकारो संयंत्रों की स्थापना में महत्वपूर्ण योगदान दिया।

यह 20वीं सदी के मध्य में भारत-सोवियत संबंधों का एक ऐतिहासिक पड़ाव था।

भारतीय इस्पात उद्योग का अवलोकन:

भारत विश्व के सबसे बड़े इस्पात उत्पादकों में से एक है, जिसमें एक व्यापक नेटवर्क वाला एकीकृत एवं लघु इस्पात संयंत्र तंत्र है।

यह उद्योग अधोसंरचना विकास और आर्थिक वृद्धि में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाता है।

question: Gaja Dwar, Ashwa Dwar, Garuda Dwar, Makar Dwar, Shardula Dwar and Hamsa Dwar are located in a building at

en.content: Gaja Dwar, Ashwa Dwar, Garuda Dwar, Makar Dwar, Shardula Dwar and Hamsa Dwar are located in a building at
en.explanation:
The monumental gates Gaja Dwar, Ashwa Dwar, Garuda Dwar, Makar Dwar, Shardula Dwar, and Hamsa Dwar are located at the Rashtrapati Bhavan in New Delhi.

Key Points

Monumental Gates: These gates are significant entrances to the Rashtrapati Bhavan, the official residence of the President of India, and are architecturally significant, representing different symbolic animals.

Architectural Heritage: Designed by Sir Edwin Lutyens and Herbert Baker, Rashtrapati Bhavan is an icon of British colonial architecture, inaugurated in 1931. The gates symbolize the heritage and cultural motifs of India.

Ceremonial Function: Besides their architectural beauty, these gates serve ceremonial purposes, underlining the historical importance of Rashtrapati Bhavan.

Additional Information

Rashtrapati Bhavan:

Scale and Function: It spans 130 hectares, making it one of the largest residences of a head of state in the world, containing 340 rooms, including official spaces for the President, guest accommodations, and ceremonial areas.

Mughal Gardens: Known for their beauty, these gardens are open to the public during the annual "Udyanotsav."

Architectural Style:

Design: The building combines classical European and Indian architectural styles. The dome is inspired by the Sanchi Stupa, with elements reflecting Indian traditions.

Ceremonial Gates:

Symbolism: Each gate, named after an animal, embodies qualities such as strength and wisdom, integral to Indian culture. The gates are adorned with intricate motifs and carvings enhancing their aesthetic value.

Sir Edwin Lutyens:

Legacy: As the chief architect of New Delhi, Lutyens designed numerous landmark structures, including the Rashtrapati Bhavan. The term "Lutyens' Delhi" denotes the area showcasing his architectural influence.

hi.content: गज द्वार, अष्ट द्वार, गह्वर द्वार, मकर द्वार, शार्दूल द्वार और हंस द्वार किस स्थान पर एक भवन में दिखते हैं?
hi.explanation:
भव्य द्वार—गज द्वार, अश्व द्वार, गरुड़ द्वार, मकर द्वार, शार्दूल द्वार तथा हंस द्वार—नई दिल्ली स्थित राष्ट्रपति भवन में स्थित हैं।

मुख्य बिंदु

भव्य द्वार: ये द्वार राष्ट्रपति भवन, जो भारत के राष्ट्रपति का आधिकारिक आवास है, के प्रमुख प्रवेश द्वार हैं और वास्तुशिल्पीय दृष्टि से महत्वपूर्ण हैं। ये विभिन्न प्रतीकात्मक पशुओं का प्रतिनिधित्व करते हैं।

वास्तुशिल्पीय विरासत: सर एडविन लुटियंस तथा हर्बर्ट बेकर द्वारा डिज़ाइन किया गया राष्ट्रपति भवन ब्रिटिश उपनिवेशकालीन वास्तुकला का प्रतीक है, जिसका उद्घाटन 1931 में हुआ था। ये द्वार भारत की विरासत और सांस्कृतिक रूपांकनों का प्रतीक हैं।

औपचारिक कार्य: वास्तुशिल्पीय सुंदरता के अतिरिक्त, ये द्वार औपचारिक प्रयोजनों की पूर्ति भी करते हैं, जो राष्ट्रपति भवन के ऐतिहासिक महत्व को रेखांकित करते हैं।

अतिरिक्त जानकारी

राष्ट्रपति भवन:

आकार और कार्य: यह परिसर 130 हेक्टेयर में फैला हुआ है, जिससे यह विश्व में किसी राष्ट्राध्यक्ष का एक विशाल आवास बनता है। इसमें 340 कमरे हैं, जिनमें राष्ट्रपति के आधिकारिक कक्ष, अतिथि कक्ष तथा औपचारिक क्षेत्र सम्मिलित हैं।

मुगल गार्डन: अपनी सुंदरता के लिए प्रसिद्ध ये उद्यान प्रतिवर्ष 'उद्यानोत्सव' के दौरान जनता के लिए खुले रहते हैं।

वास्तुशिल्पीय शैली:

डिज़ाइन: यह भवन शास्त्रीय यूरोपीय तथा भारतीय वास्तुकला शैलियों का सम्मिलन है। इसका गुंबद साँची स्तूप से प्रेरित है, जिसमें भारतीय परंपराओं की झलक मिलती है।

औपचारिक द्वार:

प्रतीकात्मक अर्थ: प्रत्येक द्वार, जो पशु के नाम पर रखा गया है, ऐसी विशेषताओं का प्रतीक है जैसे शक्ति और बुद्धि, जो भारतीय संस्कृति के अभिन्न अंग हैं। ये द्वार सुंदर रूपांकनों और नक्काशी से अलंकृत हैं, जो इनकी सौंदर्यात्मकता को बढ़ाते हैं।

सर एडविन लुटियंस:

विरासत: नए दिल्ली के मुख्य वास्तुकार के रूप में लुटियंस ने राष्ट्रपति भवन सहित कई प्रमुख भवन डिज़ाइन किए। 'लुटियंस दिल्ली' शब्द उस क्षेत्र को सूचित करता है जहाँ उनकी वास्तुशिल्पीय छाप स्पष्ट रूप से दिखाई देती है।

question: Which dance form of India has been inscribed into UNESCO’s Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity?

en.content: Which dance form of India has been inscribed into UNESCO’s Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Garba.

Key Points

Garba, a traditional dance from Gujarat, India, was added to UNESCO's Representative List of the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in 2022.

It is primarily performed during the Navratri festival, which honors Goddess Durga and celebrates the triumph of good over evil.

The dance symbolizes devotion, community bonding, and festivity, typically performed in circles around a lamp or an image of the goddess.

Garba's recognition by UNESCO underscores its cultural importance and helps in preserving and promoting India's intangible heritage worldwide.

Additional Information

UNESCO Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage:

The purpose of this list is to protect cultural traditions and practices that communities consider part of their heritage.

India has several elements on this list, including Yoga, Kumbh Mela, and Garba.

Garba vs. Dandiya Raas:

Garba uses hand and foot movements, whereas Dandiya incorporates sticks.

Both are popular during Navratri but vary in technique and presentation.

Navratri Festival:

A nine-day festival dedicated to Goddess Durga, celebrated with great enthusiasm across India, particularly in Gujarat.

Garba is a key component of Navratri festivities.

India and Intangible Cultural Heritage:

India boasts a rich tradition of diverse art forms, practices, and festivals recognized globally.

There are ongoing efforts to document and preserve these traditions for future generations.

hi.content: भारत की किस नृत्य शैली को यूनेस्को (UNESCO) ने मानवता की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक धरोहर की प्रतिनिधि सूची में शामिल किया है?
hi.explanation:
सही उत्तर है गरबा।

मुख्य बिंदु

गरबा, गुजरात, भारत का एक पारंपरिक नृत्य है, जिसे 2022 में यूनेस्को की 'मनुष्यता की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत की प्रतिनिधि सूची' (Representative List of the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity) में शामिल किया गया।

यह मुख्यतः नवरात्रि उत्सव के दौरान किया जाता है, जिसमें देवी दुर्गा की पूजा होती है और बुराई पर अच्छाई की विजय का उत्सव मनाया जाता है।

यह नृत्य भक्ति, समुदायिक एकता और उत्सव का प्रतीक है, जो प्रायः एक दीये या देवी की प्रतिमा के चारों ओर गोल घेरा बनाकर किया जाता है।

गरबा को यूनेस्को द्वारा मान्यता मिलने से इसकी सांस्कृतिक महत्ता उजागर हुई है तथा भारत की अमूर्त विरासत के संरक्षण एवं प्रसार को बढ़ावा मिला है।

अतिरिक्त जानकारी

यूनेस्को की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत की प्रतिनिधि सूची:

इस सूची का उद्देश्य उन सांस्कृतिक परंपराओं और प्रथाओं की रक्षा करना है, जिन्हें समुदाय अपनी विरासत का हिस्सा मानते हैं।

इस सूची में भारत के कई तत्व शामिल हैं, जैसे योग, कुम्भ मेला और गरबा।

गरबा बनाम डांडिया रास:

गरबा में हाथ और पैरों की गतियों का प्रयोग होता है, जबकि डांडिया में लाठी (डांडिया) का प्रयोग किया जाता है।

दोनों ही नवरात्रि में लोकप्रिय हैं, लेकिन इनकी तकनीक और प्रस्तुति में भिन्नता होती है।

नवरात्रि उत्सव:

यह नौ दिनों का उत्सव है जो देवी दुर्गा को समर्पित है और पूरे भारत में, विशेषकर गुजरात में, बड़े उत्साह से मनाया जाता है।

गरबा नवरात्रि के उत्सवों का मुख्य अंग है।

भारत और अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत:

भारत के पास विविध कला रूपों, प्रथाओं और उत्सवों की समृद्ध परंपरा है, जिसे वैश्विक स्तर पर मान्यता प्राप्त है।

इन परंपराओं के भविष्य के लिए प्रलेखन और संरक्षण के लगातार प्रयास किए जा रहे हैं।

en.excerpt: Which dance form of India has been inscribed into UNESCO’s Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity?

hi.title: NDA General Ability 13 April 2025
hi.subTitle: General Knowledge • General Studies
hi.excerpt: भारत की किस नृत्य शैली को यूनेस्को (UNESCO) ने मानवता की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक धरोहर की प्रतिनिधि सूची में शामिल किया है?

solution:
The correct answer is Garba.

Key Points

Garba, a traditional dance from Gujarat, India, was added to UNESCO's Representative List of the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in 2022.

It is primarily performed during the Navratri festival, which honors Goddess Durga and celebrates the triumph of good over evil.

The dance symbolizes devotion, community bonding, and festivity, typically performed in circles around a lamp or an image of the goddess.

Garba's recognition by UNESCO underscores its cultural importance and helps in preserving and promoting India's intangible heritage worldwide.

Additional Information

UNESCO Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage:

The purpose of this list is to protect cultural traditions and practices that communities consider part of their heritage.

India has several elements on this list, including Yoga, Kumbh Mela, and Garba.

Garba vs. Dandiya Raas:

Garba uses hand and foot movements, whereas Dandiya incorporates sticks.

Both are popular during Navratri but vary in technique and presentation.

Navratri Festival:

A nine-day festival dedicated to Goddess Durga, celebrated with great enthusiasm across India, particularly in Gujarat.

Garba is a key component of Navratri festivities.

India and Intangible Cultural Heritage:

India boasts a rich tradition of diverse art forms, practices, and festivals recognized globally.

There are ongoing efforts to document and preserve these traditions for future generations.

question: Which one of the following statements about ‘REJUPAVE’ is correct?

en.content: Which one of the following statements about ‘REJUPAVE’ is correct?

options.content: It’s a joint venture between Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO) and Government of India to promote organic farming
It’s the name given to the lightest surveillance aircraft developed by DRDO
It’s a centrally sponsored flagship Programme of the Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
It’s an indigenously developed road construction technology at high altitudes

en.explanation:
The correct statement is Option 4:

REJUPAVE is an indigenously developed road-construction and maintenance technology designed for high-altitude regions.

Brief details:

• Developed by DRDO’s High Altitude Test Station in collaboration with BRO.

• Uses polymer-modified bitumen slurry for fast, durable road repairs above 3,000 m.

• Ideal for rapid patching on strategic mountain passes.

hi.content: 'रिजुपेव (REJUVAVE)' के बारे में निम्नलिखित कथनों में से कौन-सा सही है?

options.content: यह जैविक कृषि बढ़ावा देने के लिए खाद्य एवं कृषि संगठन (FAO) और भारत सरकार के साझा समूह उद्यम है
यह डीआरडीओ (DRDO) द्वारा विकसित स्वायत्त हल्के निगरानी (सर्विलांस) विमान का नाम है
यह महिला एवं बाल विकास मंत्रालय, भारत सरकार का केंद्र प्रायोजित प्रमुख (फ्लैगशिप) कार्यक्रम है
यह स्वदेशी रूप से विकसित की गई अत्यधिक ऊंचाई (high altitude) पर उड़ने वाले ड्रोन निर्माण की तकनीक है

hi.explanation:
सही कथन विकल्प 4 है:

REJUPAVE एक स्वदेशी रूप से विकसित सड़क निर्माण और अनुरक्षण प्रौद्योगिकी है, जिसे उच्च ऊंचाई वाले क्षेत्रों के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है।

संक्षिप्त विवरण:

• डीआरडीओ (DRDO) के उच्च ऊंचाई परीक्षण स्टेशन द्वारा सीमा सड़क संगठन (BRO) के सहयोग से विकसित।

• 3,000 मीटर से अधिक ऊंचाई पर तेज़ और टिकाऊ सड़क मरम्मत के लिए बहुलक-संशोधित बिटुमिनस घोल (polymer-modified bitumen slurry) का उपयोग करता है।

• सामरिक पर्वतीय दर्रों पर त्वरित पैचिंग के लिए उपयुक्त।

question: India’s Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), part of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) has developed an aero-engine which will potentially make India self-reliance in aero-engine technology. What is the name of the engine?

en.content: India’s Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), part of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) has developed an aero-engine which will potentially make India self-reliance in aero-engine technology. What is the name of the engine?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Kaveri.

Key Points

The Kaveri engine is an indigenous aero-engine developed by the Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), a laboratory under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO).

It was specifically designed for India's Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) Tejas to achieve self-reliance in aviation propulsion systems.

The Kaveri engine project was initiated in the 1980s as part of India's efforts to reduce dependence on foreign suppliers for military equipment.

Although the Kaveri engine faced delays and challenges, its development has significantly contributed to India's expertise and technological capabilities in aero-engine manufacturing.

The engine has a thrust rating of approximately 80 kilonewtons, suitable for lightweight fighter jets like the LCA Tejas.

Additional Information

Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE)

GTRE, established in 1959, is a DRDO laboratory specializing in gas turbine engine development for military and civil applications.

It plays a pivotal role in designing and testing advanced propulsion systems for India's aerospace sector.

Challenges in Aero-Engine Development

Aero-engine development involves complex requirements such as advanced metallurgy, thermal management, and precision engineering.

India faced challenges in sourcing advanced materials and overcoming technological gaps during the Kaveri project.

Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) Tejas

The Tejas is a multi-role lightweight fighter aircraft developed by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) for the Indian Air Force and Navy.

While initially intended to be powered by the Kaveri engine, the Tejas was equipped with the GE F404 engine due to delays in the Kaveri program.

Self-Reliance in Defence

The Kaveri engine project aligns with India's broader goal of achieving self-reliance in defence technology, complementing initiatives like "Make in India."

Despite the delays, the program has enriched India's knowledge base and will be valuable for future indigenous engine development.

hi.content: रक्षा अनुसंधान एवं विकास संगठन (DRDO) का एक अंग, भारत के गैस टरबाइन अनुसंधान स्थापना (GTRE) ने एक एयरो-इंजन विकसित किया है जो संकल्प: भारत को एयरो-इंजन प्रौद्योगिकी में आत्मनिर्भर बनाएगा। इस इंजन का नाम क्या है?
hi.explanation:
सही उत्तर है कावेरी।

मुख्य बिंदु

कावेरी इंजन एक स्वदेशी विमानन इंजन है जिसे गैस टरबाइन अनुसंधान स्थापना (GTRE), जो रक्षा अनुसंधान एवं विकास संगठन (DRDO) की एक प्रयोगशाला है, द्वारा विकसित किया गया है।

यह भारत के हल्के लड़ाकू विमान (एलसीए) तेजस के लिए विशेष रूप से स्वावलंबन प्राप्त करने हेतु विमानन प्रणोदन प्रणाली के रूप में डिजाइन किया गया था।

कावेरी इंजन परियोजना 1980 के दशक में भारत के सैन्य उपकरणों के लिए विदेशी आपूर्तिकर्ताओं पर निर्भरता कम करने के प्रयास के तहत शुरू की गई थी।

हालांकि कावेरी इंजन को विकसित करने में विलंब और चुनौतियाँ आईं, इसकी विकास यात्रा ने भारत की विमानन इंजन निर्माण में विशेषज्ञता और तकनीकी क्षमताओं में महत्वपूर्ण योगदान दिया है।

इस इंजन की थ्रस्ट रेटिंग लगभग 80 किलो न्यूटन है, जो एलसीए तेजस जैसे हल्के लड़ाकू विमानों के लिए उपयुक्त है।

अतिरिक्त जानकारी

गैस टरबाइन अनुसंधान स्थापना (GTRE)

GTRE, जिसकी स्थापना 1959 में हुई थी, एक DRDO प्रयोगशाला है जो सैन्य और नागरिक उपयोगों के लिए गैस टरबाइन इंजन विकास में विशेषज्ञता रखती है।

यह भारत के अंतरिक्ष क्षेत्र के लिए उन्नत प्रणोदन प्रणालियों के डिजाइन और परीक्षण में महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाता है।

विमानन इंजन विकास में चुनौतियाँ

विमानन इंजन विकास में उन्नत धातु विज्ञान, तापीय प्रबंधन और सुस्पष्ट अभियांत्रिकी जैसी जटिल आवश्यकताएँ होती हैं।

कावेरी परियोजना के दौरान भारत को उन्नत सामग्रियों की उपलब्धता और तकनीकी अंतराल को पार करने में चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ा।

हल्का लड़ाकू विमान (एलसीए) तेजस

तेजस एक बहुउद्देशीय हल्का लड़ाकू विमान है जिसे हिंदुस्तान एयरोनॉटिक्स लिमिटेड (HAL) द्वारा भारतीय वायु सेना और नौसेना के लिए विकसित किया गया है।

यद्यपि आरंभ में इसे कावेरी इंजन द्वारा संचालित करने का इरादा था, किन्तु कावेरी कार्यक्रम में विलंब के कारण तेजस में GE F404 इंजन लगाया गया।

रक्षा क्षेत्र में आत्मनिर्भरता

कावेरी इंजन परियोजना भारत के रक्षा प्रौद्योगिकी में आत्मनिर्भरता के व्यापक लक्ष्य के अनुरूप है, और यह "मेक इन इंडिया" जैसी पहलों को भी पूरक करती है।

विलंब के बावजूद, इस कार्यक्रम ने भारत के ज्ञान आधार को समृद्ध किया है और यह भविष्य में स्वेदशी इंजन विकास हेतु मूल्यवान सिद्ध होगा।

hi.title: NDA General Ability 13 April 2025
hi.subTitle: General Knowledge • General Studies
hi.excerpt: रक्षा अनुसंधान एवं विकास संगठन (DRDO) का एक अंग, भारत के गैस टरबाइन अनुसंधान स्थापना (GTRE) ने एक एयरो-इंजन विकसित किया है जो संकल्प: भारत को एयरो-इंजन प्रौद्योगिकी में आत्मनिर्भर बनाएगा। इस इंजन का नाम क्या है?

solution:
The correct answer is Kaveri.

Key Points

The Kaveri engine is an indigenous aero-engine developed by the Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE), a laboratory under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO).

It was specifically designed for India's Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) Tejas to achieve self-reliance in aviation propulsion systems.

The Kaveri engine project was initiated in the 1980s as part of India's efforts to reduce dependence on foreign suppliers for military equipment.

Although the Kaveri engine faced delays and challenges, its development has significantly contributed to India's expertise and technological capabilities in aero-engine manufacturing.

The engine has a thrust rating of approximately 80 kilonewtons, suitable for lightweight fighter jets like the LCA Tejas.

Additional Information

Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE)

GTRE, established in 1959, is a DRDO laboratory specializing in gas turbine engine development for military and civil applications.

It plays a pivotal role in designing and testing advanced propulsion systems for India's aerospace sector.

Challenges in Aero-Engine Development

Aero-engine development involves complex requirements such as advanced metallurgy, thermal management, and precision engineering.

India faced challenges in sourcing advanced materials and overcoming technological gaps during the Kaveri project.

Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) Tejas

The Tejas is a multi-role lightweight fighter aircraft developed by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) for the Indian Air Force and Navy.

While initially intended to be powered by the Kaveri engine, the Tejas was equipped with the GE F404 engine due to delays in the Kaveri program.

Self-Reliance in Defence

The Kaveri engine project aligns with India's broader goal of achieving self-reliance in defence technology, complementing initiatives like "Make in India."

Despite the delays, the program has enriched India's knowledge base and will be valuable for future indigenous engine development.

question: Which among the following agencies releases report on ‘S.A.F.E. Accommodation: Worker Housing for Manufacturing Growth’?

en.content: Which among the following agencies releases report on ‘S.A.F.E. Accommodation: Worker Housing for Manufacturing Growth’?
en.explanation:
The report on ‘S.A.F.E. Accommodation: Worker Housing for Manufacturing Growth’ is released by the Housing and Urban Development Corporation (HUDCO).

Key Points

About HUDCO: HUDCO is a public sector organization under the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, Government of India. It is dedicated to promoting sustainable housing and urban development through both financial and technical support.

Purpose of the Report: The report focuses on delivering safe and affordable housing for industrial and manufacturing workers. This aligns with government efforts to enhance worker welfare and stimulate economic growth by improving living standards in urban and industrial settings.

HUDCO's Contributions: HUDCO has been involved in various studies and reports aimed at tackling housing challenges and advancing urban infrastructure development in India.

Additional Information

HUDCO Overview:

Founded in 1970, HUDCO specializes in financing housing and urban infrastructure projects across India.

It operates under the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs.

HUDCO also offers consultancy services for sustainable urban development projects.

Worker Housing Challenges:

Rapid urbanization often results in inadequate housing for industrial workers.

The absence of affordable and safe housing negatively affects productivity and well-being.

Government-supported initiatives, such as HUDCO's report, aim to systematically address these issues.

Affordable Housing Schemes in India:

The Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY) aims to provide affordable housing to both urban and rural poor.

State governments implement specific housing schemes that address local needs.

HUDCO collaborates with these schemes to ensure effective implementation and funding.

Sustainable Urban Development:

HUDCO encourages the use of green building technologies and eco-friendly construction practices.

The organization is committed to inclusive growth by addressing the housing and infrastructure needs of marginalized communities.

HUDCO's initiatives contribute to India's commitment to achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

hi.content: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी एजेंसी “एस.एफ.ई. आवास : निर्माण विकास के लिए श्रमिक आवास सुविधा” पर रिपोर्ट जारी करती है?
hi.explanation:
‘S.A.F.E. आवास: निर्माण वृद्धि के लिए श्रमिक आवास’ पर रिपोर्ट हाउसिंग एंड अर्बन डवलपमेंट कॉर्पोरेशन (HUDCO) द्वारा जारी की गई है।

मुख्य बिंदु

HUDCO के बारे में: HUDCO, आवास और शहरी कार्य मंत्रालय, भारत सरकार के अंतर्गत आने वाला एक सार्वजनिक क्षेत्र का उपक्रम है। यह वित्तीय और तकनीकी सहायता के माध्यम से सतत आवास एवं शहरी विकास को बढ़ावा देने के लिए समर्पित है।

रिपोर्ट का उद्देश्य: यह रिपोर्ट औद्योगिक तथा विनिर्माण क्षेत्र के श्रमिकों के लिए सुरक्षित और किफायती आवास उपलब्ध कराने पर केंद्रित है। यह श्रमिक कल्याण को बढ़ावा देने और शहरी व औद्योगिक क्षेत्रों में जीवन स्तर सुधारकर आर्थिक वृद्धि को प्रोत्साहित करने के सरकार के प्रयासों के अनुरूप है।

HUDCO का योगदान: HUDCO ने भारत में आवास संबंधी चुनौतियों से निपटने और शहरी अवसंरचना विकास को आगे बढ़ाने के लिए विभिन्न अध्ययन एवं रिपोर्ट तैयार किए हैं।

अतिरिक्त जानकारी

HUDCO का अवलोकन:

HUDCO की स्थापना 1970 में की गई थी, और यह पूरे भारत में आवास तथा शहरी अवसंरचना परियोजनाओं के वित्तपोषण में विशेषज्ञता रखती है।

यह आवास और शहरी कार्य मंत्रालय के अंतर्गत कार्य करता है।

HUDCO सतत शहरी विकास परियोजनाओं के लिए परामर्श सेवाएँ भी प्रदान करता है।

श्रमिक आवास की चुनौतियाँ:

तेजी से हो रहे शहरीकरण के कारण अक्सर औद्योगिक श्रमिकों को उपयुक्त आवास नहीं मिल पाता है।

किफायती और सुरक्षित आवास की अनुपस्थिति से उत्पादकता और कल्याण पर प्रतिकूल प्रभाव पड़ता है।

सरकारी सहायता प्राप्त पहलों, जैसे HUDCO की रिपोर्ट, का उद्देश्य इन समस्याओं का व्यवस्थित समाधान करना है।

भारत में किफायती आवास योजनाएँ:

प्रधान मंत्री आवास योजना (PMAY) का उद्देश्य शहरी और ग्रामीण दोनों क्षेत्र के गरीबों को किफायती आवास उपलब्ध कराना है।

राज्य सरकारें स्थानीय आवश्यकताओं के अनुसार विशिष्ट आवास योजनाएँ लागू करती हैं।

HUDCO इन योजनाओं के साथ मिलकर इनका प्रभावी क्रियान्वयन और वित्तपोषण सुनिश्चित करता है।

सतत शहरी विकास:

HUDCO, हरित भवन प्रौद्योगिकियों और पर्यावरण अनुकूल निर्माण तकनीकों के उपयोग को बढ़ावा देता है।

यह संगठन, हाशिए पर स्थित समुदायों की आवास और आधारभूत संरचना की आवश्यकताओं को पूरा करके समावेशी विकास के लिए प्रतिबद्ध है।

HUDCO की पहलों से भारत के सतत विकास लक्ष्यों (SDGs) को प्राप्त करने की दिशा में योगदान होता है।

question:
Consider the following statements:

1. Kozhikode has been included in UNESCO's creative cities network as the 'City of Music'

2. Garba of Gujarat has been declared by UNESCO as an intangible cultural heritage

3. Gwalior has been included in UNESCO's creative cities net- work as the 'City of Literature'

How many of the above statements is/are correct?

en.content:
Consider the following statements:

1. Kozhikode has been included in UNESCO's creative cities network as the 'City of Music'

2. Garba of Gujarat has been declared by UNESCO as an intangible cultural heritage

3. Gwalior has been included in UNESCO's creative cities net- work as the 'City of Literature'

How many of the above statements is/are correct?
en.explanation:
Kozhikode has been included in UNESCO's creative cities network as the 'City of Music'

This statement is incorrect. Kozhikode (also known as Calicut) was indeed included in UNESCO's Creative Cities Network, but it was designated as the 'City of Literature', not the 'City of Music'. The 'City of Music' designation went to Gwalior.

Garba of Gujarat has been declared by UNESCO as an intangible cultural heritage

This statement is correct. The traditional dance form of Garba from Gujarat was officially inscribed on UNESCO's Representative List of the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in December 2023.

Gwalior has been included in UNESCO's creative cities network as the 'City of Literature'

This statement is incorrect. Gwalior was also included in UNESCO's Creative Cities Network, but it received the designation of 'City of Music', not the 'City of Literature'. As mentioned above, Kozhikode was named the 'City of Literature'.

So, only the second statement is correct.

Therefore, the answer is 1.

hi.content:
निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें:

1. कोझिकोड को यूनेस्को के क्रिएटिव सिटीज नेटवर्क में 'संगीत का शहर' के रूप में शामिल किया गया है।

2. गुजरात के गरबा को यूनेस्को द्वारा अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत घोषित किया गया है।

3. ग्वालियर को यूनेस्को के क्रिएटिव सिटीज नेटवर्क में 'साहित्य का शहर' के रूप में शामिल किया गया है।

उपरोक्त में से कितने कथन सही हैं?
hi.explanation:
कोझिकोड को यूनेस्को की रचनात्मक नगर नेटवर्क में 'संगीत नगरी' के रूप में शामिल किया गया है

यह कथन असत्य है। कोझिकोड (जिसे कालीकट भी कहा जाता है) वास्तव में यूनेस्को की रचनात्मक नगरों के नेटवर्क में शामिल किया गया था, लेकिन इसे 'साहित्य नगरी' (City of Literature) के रूप में नामित किया गया है, न कि 'संगीत नगरी' (City of Music) के रूप में। 'संगीत नगरी' का दर्जा ग्वालियर को प्रदान किया गया।

गुजरात का गरबा यूनेस्को द्वारा अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत के रूप में घोषित किया गया है

यह कथन सत्य है। गुजरात का पारंपरिक नृत्य रूप गरबा को दिसंबर 2023 में मानवता की अमूर्त सांस्कृतिक विरासत की यूनेस्को की प्रतिनिधि सूची में औपचारिक रूप से सम्मिलित किया गया।

ग्वालियर को यूनेस्को की रचनात्मक नगर नेटवर्क में 'साहित्य नगरी' के रूप में शामिल किया गया है

यह कथन असत्य है। ग्वालियर को भी यूनेस्को की रचनात्मक नगरों के नेटवर्क में शामिल किया गया था, परंतु इसे 'संगीत नगरी' (City of Music) का दर्जा प्रदान किया गया, 'साहित्य नगरी' (City of Literature) का नहीं। जैसा कि ऊपर उल्लेखित है, कोझिकोड को 'साहित्य नगरी' नामित किया गया था।

अतः केवल दूसरा कथन ही सत्य है।

इसलिए उत्तर है 1।

solution:
Kozhikode has been included in UNESCO's creative cities network as the 'City of Music'

This statement is incorrect. Kozhikode (also known as Calicut) was indeed included in UNESCO's Creative Cities Network, but it was designated as the 'City of Literature', not the 'City of Music'. The 'City of Music' designation went to Gwalior.

Garba of Gujarat has been declared by UNESCO as an intangible cultural heritage

This statement is correct. The traditional dance form of Garba from Gujarat was officially inscribed on UNESCO's Representative List of the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in December 2023.

Gwalior has been included in UNESCO's creative cities network as the 'City of Literature'

This statement is incorrect. Gwalior was also included in UNESCO's Creative Cities Network, but it received the designation of 'City of Music', not the 'City of Literature'. As mentioned above, Kozhikode was named the 'City of Literature'.

So, only the second statement is correct.

Therefore, the answer is 1.

question:
Consider the following statements:

1. First Indian Military Heritage festival was inaugurated in Octo- ber 2023 in Pune

2. First Green Hydrogen Fuel Cell Bus was flagged off in India in Bangalore

3. South Africa chaired the 15th BRICS Summit held in 2023

4. Viksit Bharat Sankalp Yatra was flagged off in 2023 from Jharkhand

How many of the above statements is/are correct?

en.content:
Consider the following statements:

1. First Indian Military Heritage festival was inaugurated in Octo- ber 2023 in Pune

2. First Green Hydrogen Fuel Cell Bus was flagged off in India in Bangalore

3. South Africa chaired the 15th BRICS Summit held in 2023

4. Viksit Bharat Sankalp Yatra was flagged off in 2023 from Jharkhand

How many of the above statements is/are correct?
en.explanation:
The correct number of accurate statements is 3.

Key Points

First Indian Military Heritage Festival: This event was not inaugurated in October 2023 in Pune.

First Green Hydrogen Fuel Cell Bus: The bus was flagged off in Pune, not Bangalore.

15th BRICS Summit: South Africa chaired the summit in 2023, held in Johannesburg.

Viksit Bharat Sankalp Yatra: It was launched in Maharashtra in 2023, not Jharkhand.

Additional Information

BRICS Summit 2023:

Held from August 22-24, 2023, in Johannesburg, South Africa.

Discussions included economic cooperation, global governance, and sustainable development.

Leaders from Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa participated.

Green Hydrogen Fuel Cell Bus:

Green hydrogen is produced using renewable resources, providing zero carbon emissions.

Hydrogen in fuel cell buses generates electricity, emitting only water vapor.

Represents a major step towards sustainable and clean public transport.

Viksit Bharat Sankalp Yatra:

Aimed at promoting development and progress in various Indian regions.

Emphasizes infrastructure development, healthcare improvements, and educational initiatives.

Involves partnerships between government, private sectors, and local communities.

hi.content:
निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें:

1. पहला भारतीय सैन्य विरासत उत्सव अक्टूबर 2023 में पुणे में उद्घाटित किया गया था

2. भारत में पहली हरित हाइड्रोजन ईंधन सेल बस को बैंगलोर में हरी झंडी दिखाई गई

3. दक्षिण अफ्रीका ने 2023 में आयोजित 15वें BRICS शिखर सम्मेलन की अध्यक्षता की

4. विकसित भारत संकल्प यात्रा 2023 में झारखंड से शुरू की गई थी

उपरोक्त में से कितने कथन सही हैं?
hi.explanation:
सही कथनों की संख्या 3 है।

मुख्य बिंदु

प्रथम भारतीय सैन्य विरासत उत्सव: यह कार्यक्रम अक्टूबर 2023 में पुणे में उद्घाटित नहीं हुआ था।

प्रथम हरित हाइड्रोजन ईंधन सेल बस: बस का शुभारम्भ पुणे में हुआ था, बेंगलुरु में नहीं।

15वां ब्रिक्स शिखर सम्मेलन: वर्ष 2023 में दक्षिण अफ्रीका ने शिखर सम्मेलन की अध्यक्षता की, जो जोहान्सबर्ग में आयोजित हुआ।

विकसित भारत संकल्प यात्रा: इसे 2023 में महाराष्ट्र में शुरू किया गया था, झारखंड में नहीं।

अतिरिक्त जानकारी

ब्रिक्स शिखर सम्मेलन 2023:

22-24 अगस्त, 2023 के बीच, जोहान्सबर्ग, दक्षिण अफ्रीका में आयोजित हुआ।

चर्चाओं में आर्थिक सहयोग, वैश्विक शासन और सतत विकास शामिल थे।

ब्राजील, रूस, भारत, चीन और दक्षिण अफ्रीका के नेताओं ने भाग लिया।

हरित हाइड्रोजन ईंधन सेल बस:

हरित हाइड्रोजन अक्षय स्रोतों से निर्मित होती है, जिससे कार्बन उत्सर्जन शून्य होता है।

ईंधन सेल बसों में हाइड्रोजन से विद्युत् उत्पन्न होती है, जिससे केवल जल वाष्प निकलता है।

यह सार्वजनिक परिवहन को सतत् तथा स्वच्छ बनाने की दिशा में महत्वपूर्ण कदम है।

विकसित भारत संकल्प यात्रा:

यह भारत के विभिन्न क्षेत्रों में विकास और प्रगति को बढ़ावा देने के उद्देश्य से आरंभ की गई।

इसका ध्यान आधारभूत संरचना विकास, स्वास्थ्य सेवाओं में सुधार और शैक्षिक पहलों पर है।

इसमें सरकार, निजी क्षेत्र और स्थानीय समुदायों के बीच साझेदारी शामिल है।

question: In January 2024, India has entered into a bilateral agreement through which it will provide grant assistance to a country to construct a 20 feet Bailey bridge. Identify the country.

en.content: In January 2024, India has entered into a bilateral agreement through which it will provide grant assistance to a country to construct a 20 feet Bailey bridge. Identify the country.

question: <!-- x-tinymce/html -->Which one among the following Joint Military Exercises was NOT conducted between India and USA?

en.content: <!-- x-tinymce/html -->Which one among the following Joint Military Exercises was NOT conducted between India and USA?
en.explanation:
Yudhabhyas: This is a pretty well-known annual joint military exercise specifically between the armies of India and the USA.

Vajra Prahar: This is another significant joint exercise that focuses on special forces training between India and the USA.

Malabar: This naval exercise started as a bilateral exercise between India and the USA. Over time, it expanded to include Japan and, more recently, Australia. So, it definitely involves India and the USA.

Varuna: Ah, this one! The Varuna exercise is actually a bilateral naval exercise conducted between India and France.

So, the exercise that was NOT conducted between India and the USA is Varuna.

hi.content: निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा संयुक्त सैन्य अभ्यास भारत और अमेरिका के बीच आयोजित नहीं किया गया था?
hi.explanation:
युद्धाभ्यास: यह भारत और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका की सेनाओं के बीच एक प्रसिद्ध वार्षिक संयुक्त सैन्य अभ्यास है।

वज्र प्रहार: यह एक और महत्वपूर्ण संयुक्त अभ्यास है, जो भारत और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के विशेष बलों के प्रशिक्षण पर केंद्रित है।

मालाबार: यह नौसैनिक अभ्यास प्रारंभ में भारत और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के बीच द्विपक्षीय अभ्यास के रूप में शुरू हुआ था। समय के साथ इसमें जापान और हाल ही में ऑस्ट्रेलिया भी शामिल हो गए हैं। अतः इसमें निश्चित रूप से भारत और अमेरिका शामिल हैं।

वरुण: यह द्विपक्षीय नौसैनिक अभ्यास वास्तव में भारत और फ्रांस के बीच आयोजित किया जाता है।

इसलिए, वह अभ्यास जो भारत और अमेरिका के बीच आयोजित नहीं किया गया है, वह है वरुण।

question:
Consider the following statements:

1. India has secured 10th rank in International Shipment category in World Bank's Logistics Perform- ance Index Report-2023

2. Global Maritime India Summit- 2023 was held in Vishakhapatnam

3. 'Maritime Amrit Kaal Vision 2047' was launched during Global Maritime India Summit-2023

How many of the above statements is/are correct?

en.content:
Consider the following statements:

1. India has secured 10th rank in International Shipment category in World Bank's Logistics Perform- ance Index Report-2023

2. Global Maritime India Summit- 2023 was held in Vishakhapatnam

3. 'Maritime Amrit Kaal Vision 2047' was launched during Global Maritime India Summit-2023

How many of the above statements is/are correct?
en.explanation:
India's rank in World Bank's Logistics Performance Index Report-2023: This statement claims India secured the 10th rank in the International Shipment category. However, in the World Bank's Logistics Performance Index (LPI) 2023 report, India actually jumped to the 38th overall rank (from 44th in 2018). Specifically, in the 'International Shipments' category, India was ranked 22nd, not 10th. So, this statement isn't quite right.

Venue of Global Maritime India Summit-2023: The statement says the summit was held in Vishakhapatnam. The Global Maritime India Summit 2023 actually took place in Mumbai. So, this statement is incorrect as well.

'Maritime Amrit Kaal Vision 2047': This vision was indeed launched during the Global Maritime India Summit-2023. It's a long-term plan aiming to develop India's maritime sector by 2047. This statement is correct!

So, out of the three statements, only one is correct.

hi.content:
निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें:

1. भारत ने विश्व बैंक की रसद प्रदर्शन सूचकांक रिपोर्ट-2023 में अंतर्राष्ट्रीय शिपमेंट श्रेणी में 10वां स्थान प्राप्त किया है।

2. वैश्विक समुद्री भारत शिखर सम्मेलन- 2023 विशाखापत्तनम में आयोजित किया गया था।

3. वैश्विक समुद्री भारत शिखर सम्मेलन-2023 के दौरान 'समुद्री अमृत काल विजन 2047' लॉन्च किया गया था।

उपरोक्त में से कितने कथन सही हैं?
hi.explanation:
विश्व बैंक के लॉजिस्टिक्स प्रदर्शन सूचकांक रिपोर्ट-2023 में भारत की रैंक: यह कथन दावा करता है कि भारत ने अंतर्राष्ट्रीय शिपमेंट श्रेणी में 10वां स्थान प्राप्त किया। हालांकि, विश्व बैंक के लॉजिस्टिक्स प्रदर्शन सूचकांक (LPI) 2023 रिपोर्ट में भारत ने वास्तव में कुल मिलाकर 38वां स्थान (2018 में 44वें से) प्राप्त किया। विशेष रूप से, 'अंतर्राष्ट्रीय शिपमेंट्स' श्रेणी में, भारत का स्थान 22वां था, 10वां नहीं। अतः यह कथन सत्य नहीं है।

ग्लोबल मेरीटाइम इंडिया समिट-2023 का स्थल: कथन में कहा गया है कि यह समिट विशाखापत्तनम में आयोजित हुई थी। जबकि, ग्लोबल मेरीटाइम इंडिया समिट 2023 वास्तव में मुंबई में आयोजित की गई थी। अतः यह कथन भी असत्य है।

'मेरीटाइम अमृत काल विज़न 2047': यह विजन वास्तव में ग्लोबल मेरीटाइम इंडिया समिट-2023 के दौरान आरंभ किया गया था। इसका उद्देश्य 2047 तक भारत के समुद्री क्षेत्र के विकास के लिए एक दीर्घकालिक योजना है। यह कथन सत्य है!

अतः तीनों में से केवल एक ही कथन सही है।

question:
Consider the following UN Declarations/Covenants :

1. Universal Declaration of Human Rights

2. Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women

3. International Covenant of Economic, Social and Cultural Rights

4. Convention on Refugees

Which one of the following is the correct chronological order (starting with the earliest) of the above ?

en.content:
Consider the following UN Declarations/Covenants :

1. Universal Declaration of Human Rights

2. Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women

3. International Covenant of Economic, Social and Cultural Rights

4. Convention on Refugees

Which one of the following is the correct chronological order (starting with the earliest) of the above ?
en.explanation:
To determine the correct chronological order of the given UN Declarations/Covenants, we need to know the specific years in which each was adopted :

1. Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR) was adopted on December 10, 1948.

2. Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women (CEDAW) was adopted on December 18, 1979.

3. International Covenant of Economic, Social and Cultural Rights (ICESCR) was adopted on December 16, 1966.

4. Convention on Refugees (Refugee Convention) was adopted on July 28, 1951.

Now, let's list these years in order to determine the correct sequence :

- 1948 : Universal Declaration of Human Rights (1)

- 1951 : Convention on Refugees (4)

- 1966 : International Covenant of Economic, Social and Cultural Rights (3)

- 1979 : Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women (2)

The correct chronological order is :

1. Universal Declaration of Human Rights

2. Convention on Refugees

3. International Covenant of Economic, Social and Cultural Rights

4. Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women

Therefore, the correct option is :

Option A : 1, 4, 3, 2

en.content:

2. The Government of India has accorded its approval for India's participation in the international mega science project.

Select the answer using the code given below :
en.explanation:
The Square Kilometre Array (SKA) project is indeed a significant international endeavor aimed at creating the world's largest and most sensitive radio telescope. Let’s evaluate the given statements :

Statement 1 : SKA is a state-of-the-art, mega science international facility to build the world's biggest and most sensitive radio telescope for addressing a wide variety of cutting-edge science goals.

This statement is correct. The SKA project aims to construct an extensive array of radio telescopes with an effective collecting area of one square kilometer. This facility will enable unprecedented precision in radio astronomy and will help answer fundamental questions about the universe, such as the formation of galaxies, the nature of dark matter, and the potential for life beyond Earth.

Statement 2 : The Government of India has accorded its approval for India's participation in the international mega science project.

This statement is also correct. The Government of India has indeed approved participation in the SKA project, highlighting India's commitment to contributing to and benefiting from this cutting-edge international scientific endeavor.

Therefore, both statements 1 and 2 are correct.

Option C : Both 1 and 2

Based on this analysis, the statement that is NOT correct is:

Option A: Area wise Madhya Pradesh is the fourth largest state in India.

question: Who among the following is known as the architect of Indian planning?

en.content: Who among the following is known as the architect of Indian planning?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option C, P.C. Mahalanobis.

P.C. Mahalanobis is widely recognized as the architect of Indian planning due to his pivotal role in shaping the country's economic policies after independence. He is best known for introducing the Mahalanobis model of economic development, which heavily emphasized the development of heavy industries and a focus on self-reliance.

Here's why the other options are incorrect:

Option A, V.K.R.V. Rao: While V.K.R.V. Rao was a renowned economist and played a significant role in Indian economic planning, he was more focused on agricultural development and social welfare aspects. He is considered a champion of rural development and was instrumental in shaping India's Five-Year Plans.

Option B, Sukhamoy Chakravarty: Sukhamoy Chakravarty was a prominent economist who later served as the chairman of the Planning Commission. However, he primarily contributed to the theoretical and mathematical aspects of economic planning, rather than being the architect of the overall framework.

Option D, John Mathai: John Mathai was the first Finance Minister of independent India. While he played a role in the initial stages of economic planning, his contributions were more focused on financial management and policy implementation.

In conclusion, P.C. Mahalanobis's significant contributions, particularly the Mahalanobis model, established him as the architect of Indian planning, guiding the nation's economic development strategy for several decades after independence.

2. Six members are elected each year by the General Assembly for two year term

en.content:
Which among the following statements regarding the election of non-permanent members to the United Nations Security Council is/are correct?

1. Five members coming from Africa and Asia, one from Eastern Europe, two from Latin America and two from Western Europe and other states

2. Six members are elected each year by the General Assembly for two year term

Select the correct answer using the code given below:
en.explanation:
Let's analyze each statement regarding the election of non-permanent members to the United Nations Security Council:

Statement 1: "Five members coming from Africa and Asia, one from Eastern Europe, two from Latin America and two from Western Europe and other states"

This statement is correct. The allocation of the ten non-permanent seats on the United Nations Security Council is distributed among various regional groups as follows:

  • 5 seats for African and Asian States
  • 1 seat for Eastern European States
  • 2 seats for Latin American and Caribbean States
  • 2 seats for Western European and other States

Statement 2: "Six members are elected each year by the General Assembly for a two-year term"

This statement is incorrect. The General Assembly elects five non-permanent members each year for a two-year term. This ensures a rotational system where five new members join the Security Council each year, resulting in overlapping terms.

Given our analysis of each statement, the correct answer is:

Option A: 1 only

question:
Consider the following statements about Centralized Laboratory Net- work (CLN):

1. CLN works to test vaccines can be used during which pandemic

2. India is a member of CLN

3. CLN is a part of the Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI)

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?

en.content:
Consider the following statements about Centralized Laboratory Net- work (CLN):

1. CLN works to test vaccines can be used during which pandemic

2. India is a member of CLN

3. CLN is a part of the Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI)

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option D: 1, 2 and 3. Here's why:

1. CLN works to test vaccines can be used during which pandemic

This statement is correct. The Centralized Laboratory Network (CLN) is a global network of laboratories established to accelerate the development and testing of vaccines during a pandemic. Its main purpose is to provide a centralized platform for coordinating and standardizing vaccine testing procedures, ensuring quicker and more efficient vaccine development.

2. India is a member of CLN

This statement is also correct. India is an active member of the Centralized Laboratory Network (CLN). The Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) is a key participant in the CLN, contributing its expertise and resources to the network's activities.

3. CLN is a part of the Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI)

This statement is correct. The Centralized Laboratory Network (CLN) is indeed a part of the Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI). CEPI is a global partnership that works to accelerate the development of vaccines against emerging infectious diseases. CLN serves as a critical component within CEPI's overall strategy for pandemic preparedness.

In summary, all three statements accurately describe the Centralized Laboratory Network (CLN) and its role in global pandemic preparedness.

question:
Consider the following statements about Kavach, the automatic train protection system:

1. It is designed and developed by Research Design and Standard Organisation (RDSO) in collaboration with Railway Technical Research Institute (RTRI), Japan

2. The trials of Kavach were facilitated by the Southern Railway

3. Kavach is a state-of-the-art electronic system with Safety Integrity Level-4 (SIL-4)

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?

en.content:
Consider the following statements about Kavach, the automatic train protection system:

1. It is designed and developed by Research Design and Standard Organisation (RDSO) in collaboration with Railway Technical Research Institute (RTRI), Japan

2. The trials of Kavach were facilitated by the Southern Railway

3. Kavach is a state-of-the-art electronic system with Safety Integrity Level-4 (SIL-4)

Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
en.explanation:
Let's analyze each of the statements about Kavach, the automatic train protection system:

1. It is designed and developed by Research Design and Standard Organisation (RDSO) in collaboration with Railway Technical Research Institute (RTRI), Japan

This statement is incorrect. The Kavach system was designed and developed indigenously by the Research Design and Standard Organisation (RDSO) in India in collaboration with multiple local firms and not specifically with the Railway Technical Research Institute (RTRI) of Japan.

2. The trials of Kavach were facilitated by the Southern Railway

This statement is also incorrect. The trials of Kavach were facilitated primarily by the South Central Railway (SCR) zone, not the Southern Railway.

3. Kavach is a state-of-the-art electronic system with Safety Integrity Level-4 (SIL-4)

This statement is correct. Kavach is indeed a state-of-the-art electronic system that has Safety Integrity Level-4 (SIL-4), which is the highest level of safety integrity.

Therefore, only statement 3 is correct.

The correct option is:

Option B: 3 only

question: Deendayal Port was earlier known as:

en.content: Deendayal Port was earlier known as:
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Kandla Port.

Kandla Port is a tidal port located in the state of Gujarat.

It was renamed as Deendayal Port and became the third port to be named after a person.

The other two ports are Jawahar Lal Nehru Port of Mumbai and Kamarajar Port.

Kandla Port is located on Kandla Creek, 90 km inward from the Gulf of Kachchh.

At a distance of 9 km from the port, Kandla SEZ is located, which was established in 1965.

question: The UN COP-27 Summit relates to:

en.content: The UN COP-27 Summit relates to:
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option C: Climate change.

Here's why:

The UN COP-27 Summit stands for the 27th Conference of the Parties of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change. It's an annual event where world leaders, scientists, activists, and other stakeholders gather to discuss and negotiate global action on climate change. The primary focus of these conferences is:

  • Assessing the global climate situation: The summit reviews the current state of the climate, analyzes data, and evaluates the progress made in combating climate change.
  • Setting targets and commitments: Countries commit to specific goals and actions to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and adapt to the impacts of climate change.
  • Developing solutions: COP summits facilitate the development of new technologies, policies, and financial mechanisms to address climate change.

The other options are unrelated to the COP-27 Summit:

  • Option A: Russia-Ukraine war: This is a geopolitical conflict with no direct connection to the COP-27 Summit.
  • Option B: Terrorism and counter-terrorism: While climate change can contribute to instability and conflict, the COP-27 Summit is not specifically focused on terrorism.
  • Option D: Interpol: Interpol is an international law enforcement agency and is not involved in the COP-27 Summit.

question: Which of the following Indian Naval Ships were decommissioned in June 2022?

en.content: Which of the following Indian Naval Ships were decommissioned in June 2022?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is INS Nishank and INS Akshay.

  • The Indian Navy bid farewell to its two ships, INS Nishank and INS Akshay, at Naval Dockyard in Mumbai on 3 June 2022.
  • Both ships were decommissioned at Naval Dockyard after 32 years of service.
  • Nishank, the fourth of the Veer-class missile corvettes, was an integral part of the "Killer Squadron", renowned for its heroics in the 1971 war.

Additional Information

  • INS Gomati was decommissioned at the Naval Dockyard in Mumbai on 28 May 2022.
  • INS Gomati derives her name from the river Gomti and was commissioned on 16 April 1988.
  • It was the oldest warrior of the Western Fleet at the time of its decommissioning.
  • The ship will be dismantled and transported to Lucknow, where it will be installed as the "Gomati Shaurya Smarak," a museum celebrating Gomati’s service career.
  • For its contribution to national maritime security, INS Gomati was twice awarded the coveted Unit Citation, once in 2007-08 and again in 2019-20.

question: India signed a deal with which one of the following countries to supply MH-60R helicopters to the Indian Navy?

en.content: India signed a deal with which one of the following countries to supply MH-60R helicopters to the Indian Navy?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option D, USA.

India signed a deal with the United States to supply MH-60R helicopters to the Indian Navy. This deal was finalized in 2016 and involved the purchase of 24 MH-60R Seahawk multi-role helicopters.

The MH-60R is a highly capable helicopter designed for anti-submarine warfare (ASW), anti-surface warfare (ASuW), search and rescue (SAR), and other maritime missions. It is equipped with advanced sensors, weapons systems, and communication capabilities, making it a valuable asset for the Indian Navy.

The purchase of these helicopters is part of India's ongoing efforts to modernize its naval capabilities and enhance its maritime security posture.

question: In January 2020, the administration of which of the following Union Territories has been merged together?

en.content: In January 2020, the administration of which of the following Union Territories has been merged together?

options.content: Puducherry and Dadra and Nagar Haveli
Puducherry and Andaman and Nicobar Islands
Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option D: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu.

Here's why:

On 26th January 2020, the Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu (Merger of Union Territories) Act, 2019 came into effect. This act merged the two separate union territories of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu into a single union territory known as Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu.

The other options are incorrect because no other Union Territories were merged in January 2020.

question: The Headquarters of South-Eastern Railway is located at

en.content: The Headquarters of South-Eastern Railway is located at
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option C: Kolkata.

The South Eastern Railway (SER) zone is one of the 18 zones of Indian Railways. Its headquarters are located in Kolkata, West Bengal. The SER zone is a significant part of the Indian railway network, responsible for a large area encompassing parts of West Bengal, Odisha, Jharkhand, and Chhattisgarh. While other options mention important railway hubs in India (Bilaspur, Secunderabad, and Bhubaneswar), they are not the headquarters of the South Eastern Railway. Kolkata's central location within the SER zone's operational area makes it a strategically suitable location for the administrative and operational control of the railway network.

en.content: Which one of the following statements is not correct in respect of the 'Legion of Merit' award?

options.content: This award is conferred by the President of the United States of America.

It is the highest civilian award of the United States of America.

The "Legion of Merit" is not the highest civilian award of the United States. It is a military award given for exceptionally meritorious conduct in the performance of outstanding services and achievements. The highest civilian honor in the United States is the Presidential Medal of Freedom.

question: Recently a state of emergency has been declared in which one of the following countries?

en.content: Recently a state of emergency has been declared in which one of the following countries?
en.explanation:
The correct answer is Option D: Myanmar.

A state of emergency was declared in Myanmar following the military coup in February 2021. The declaration allowed the military to assume control of the government and significantly curtail civil liberties. This declaration led to widespread protests, crackdowns, and a humanitarian crisis within the country. While other countries in the region may face challenges, the specific declaration of a state of emergency, with the resulting implications for governance and human rights, was most prominent in Myanmar at that time. question: Which country has replaced Maldives to host the 2023 Indian Ocean Island Games?

en.content: Which country has replaced Maldives to host the 2023 Indian Ocean Island Games?
en.explanation:
Madagascar has replaced the Maldives as the host of the 2023 Indian Ocean Island Games.

Hosting Change: Madagascar took over from the Maldives as the venue for the 2023 Indian Ocean Island Games.

Previous Decision: The event was initially awarded to the Maldives last year.

Reason for Change: The switch was made due to concerns related to the COVID-19 pandemic.

History of the Games: The first edition of the Indian Ocean Island Games was held in 1979, and the event occurs every four years.

Participating Regions: The games involve island nations and territories, including Mauritius, Seychelles, Comoros, Madagascar, Mayotte, Réunion, and the Maldives.

hi.content: किस देश ने 2023 के हिंद महासागर द्वीप खेलों की मेजबानी के लिए मालदीव की जगह ली है?
hi.explanation:
2023 इंडियन ओशन आइलैंड गेम्स की मेजबानी में बदलाव

मेजबानी परिवर्तन:

मालदीव को हटाकर मेडागास्कर को 2023 इंडियन ओशन आइलैंड गेम्स की मेजबानी सौंपी गई है।

पिछला निर्णय:

इस आयोजन की मेजबानी पिछले वर्ष मालदीव को सौंपी गई थी।

परिवर्तन का कारण:

मेजबानी में यह बदलाव कोविड-19 महामारी से संबंधित चिंताओं के कारण किया गया।

खेलों का इतिहास:

She recently won a Grand Slam championship.
She became the first female match official to conduct a men's cricket test match.
She has been conferred with the Gandhi Peace Prize.
question: Identify the correct reason, out of the following, about Claire Polosak for being in the news:

en.content: Identify the correct reason, out of the following, about Claire Polosak for being in the news:

options.content: She has been honoured with the Pulitzer Prize.
She recently won a Grand Slam championship.
She became the first female match official to conduct a men's cricket test match.
She has been conferred with the Gandhi Peace Prize.

en.explanation:
The correct answer is C.

Claire Polosak achieved significant recognition by becoming the first female match official to umpire a men's cricket Test match. This groundbreaking achievement made headlines worldwide and highlighted progress towards gender equality in officiating major sporting events. Options A, B, and D are incorrect; Claire Polosak's career is focused on cricket officiating, not journalism (Pulitzer Prize), professional athletic competition (Grand Slam), or peace activism (Gandhi Peace Prize). Her role as a Test match umpire represents a milestone in the history of cricket and sports officiating in general. It's important to note that while umpiring isn't directly "playing" the game, it is a crucial and highly skilled component of the sport, requiring extensive knowledge, judgment, and the ability to handle pressure at the highest level. Polosak's achievement is a testament to her dedication and expertise, opening doors for future female officials in cricket and other sports.

hi.content: क्लेयर पोलोसाक के समाचार में रहने के लिए निम्नलिखित में से सही कारण की पहचान करें:

options.content: उन्हें पुलित्जर पुरस्कार से सम्मानित किया जा चुका है।
उन्होंने हाल ही में ग्रैंड स्लैम चैंपियनशिप जीती है।
वह पुरुष क्रिकेट टेस्ट मैच आयोजित करने वाली पहली महिला मैच अधिकारी बनीं।
उन्हें गांधी शांति पुरस्कार से सम्मानित किया गया है।

hi.explanation:
सही उत्तर विकल्प C है: वह पुरुष क्रिकेट टेस्ट मैच आयोजित करने वाली पहली महिला मैच अधिकारी बनीं।

क्लेयर पोलोसाक एक उल्लेखनीय महिला क्रिकेट अंपायर हैं जिन्होंने इतिहास रच दिया है। उन्हें पुरुष क्रिकेट टेस्ट मैच में अंपायरिंग करने वाली पहली महिला होने का सम्मान प्राप्त हुआ है। यह एक ऐतिहासिक क्षण था जिसने क्रिकेट में लैंगिक समानता के लिए एक मील का पत्थर स्थापित किया है और दुनिया भर के खेल प्रेमियों और मीडिया का ध्यान आकर्षित किया है। इस उपलब्धि ने उन्हें समाचारों में प्रमुखता से स्थान दिलाया।

विकल्प A, B, और D गलत हैं क्योंकि क्लेयर पोलोसाक को पुलित्जर पुरस्कार, गांधी शांति पुरस्कार से सम्मानित नहीं किया गया है और न ही उन्होंने कोई ग्रैंड स्लैम चैंपियनशिप जीती है। ये पुरस्कार और उपलब्धियाँ अलग-अलग क्षेत्रों से संबंधित हैं और क्लेयर पोलोसाक की वर्तमान प्रसिद्धि से संबंधित नहीं हैं।

question: Which one of the following planets has the highest density?

en.content: Which one of the following planets has the highest density?
en.explanation:
Option D: Earth

Earth has the highest density among the planets in our solar system. The average density of Earth is approximately $$5.52 \, \text{g/cm}^3$$. This high density is due to its metallic core and abundant silicate materials. To compare, here are the average densities of the other planets:

Mercury: $$5.43 \, \text{g/cm}^3$$

Venus: $$5.24 \, \text{g/cm}^3$$

Jupiter: $$1.33 \, \text{g/cm}^3$$

Jupiter, despite being the largest planet, has a much lower density because it is primarily composed of hydrogen and helium, making it a gas giant. Earth’s composition with heavier elements like iron gives it a greater density than these other planets.

hi.content: निम्नलिखित में से किस ग्रह का घनत्व सबसे अधिक है?
hi.explanation:
पृथ्वी का घनत्व सबसे अधिक है।

पृथ्वी का औसत घनत्व लगभग 5.51 ग्राम प्रति घन सेंटीमीटर है। यह सौरमंडल के अन्य ग्रहों की तुलना में काफी अधिक है। यह उच्च घनत्व पृथ्वी की संरचना के कारण है, जिसमें एक घना लोहे का कोर है जो ग्रह के कुल द्रव्यमान का एक बड़ा हिस्सा बनाता है। बुध का घनत्व भी उच्च है (लगभग 5.43 ग्राम प्रति घन सेंटीमीटर), जो इसके बड़े धात्विक कोर के कारण है, लेकिन यह पृथ्वी से थोड़ा कम है। शुक्र और बृहस्पति का घनत्व बहुत कम है, क्योंकि उनमें हल्के तत्वों की प्रधानता है। बृहस्पति गैसों का एक विशाल गोला है, जिसका घनत्व लगभग 1.33 ग्राम प्रति घन सेंटीमीटर है, जबकि शुक्र का घनत्व लगभग 5.24 ग्राम प्रति घन सेंटीमीटर है।

संक्षेप में:

पृथ्वी: ~5.51 g/cm³

बुध: ~5.43 g/cm³

शुक्र: ~5.24 g/cm³

बृहस्पति: ~1.33 g/cm³

इसलिए, सही उत्तर D. पृथ्वी है।

question: Which one of the following Oil Refineries is not located in Assam?

Tatipaka Oil Refinery is located in Andhra Pradesh, not Assam. Numaligarh, Bongaigaon, and Digboi refineries are all situated in Assam, India. The geographical location of these refineries in Assam is strategically significant, given the presence of oil and gas resources in the northeastern region of India.

question: Which one of the following is not a bio-mass energy source?

en.content: Which one of the following is not a bio-mass energy source?
en.explanation:
The source that is not considered a biomass energy source is:

Option B: Nuclear reactor

Biomass energy sources are typically derived from organic materials. They commonly include plant-based materials like wood, agricultural residues, and gases produced from biological processes (such as gobar gas, also known as biogas). Coal, while also originally derived from biological materials, is considered a fossil fuel due to its ancient origin and different energy characteristics compared to typical biomass resources. In contrast, nuclear reactors generate energy from nuclear fission processes and are not related to biological matter.

hi.content: निम्नलिखित में से कौन जैव-ऊर्जा का एक स्रोत नहीं है?
hi.explanation:
जैव-ऊर्जा, जैविक पदार्थों से प्राप्त ऊर्जा का रूप है। लकड़ी, गोबर गैस, और कोयला सभी जैविक स्रोतों से प्राप्त होते हैं और इसलिए जैव-ऊर्जा के स्रोत हैं।

लकड़ी: पेड़ों से प्राप्त होता है, जो प्रकाश संश्लेषण द्वारा सूर्य की ऊर्जा को संग्रहीत करते हैं।

गोबर गैस (बायोगैस): जैविक अपशिष्ट पदार्थों के एनारोबिक अपघटन से बनती है।

कोयला: मृत वनस्पतियों के लाखों वर्षों से धीरे-धीरे दबाव और गर्मी के अंतर्गत परिवर्तन से बनता है।

दूसरी ओर, नाभिकीय रिऐक्टर परमाणु विखंडन द्वारा ऊर्जा उत्पन्न करता है। यह प्रक्रिया जैविक पदार्थों पर निर्भर नहीं करती है, बल्कि परमाणुओं के नाभिक के विखंडन पर आधारित है। इसलिए, नाभिकीय रिऐक्टर जैव-ऊर्जा का स्रोत नहीं है।

इसलिए, सही उत्तर B. नाभिकीय रिऐक्टर है।

en.explanation: The Union Government has constituted a Task Force to review the Income Tax Act, 1961 and draft a new Direct Tax Law in consonance with current economic needs of the country. Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) member Arbind Modi will be the convenor of Task Force while Chief Economic Adviser Dr. Arvind Subramanian will be a permanent Special Invitee. It will submit its report within six months.

He was an Indian journalist, editor and author. He was associated with the Statesman, the Guardian, the Times of India, etc. He received the Ramnath Goenka Lifetime Achievement Award in 2013. He died in June, 2016.

He person referred to above is
en.explanation: Veteran journalist Inder Malhotra passed away at the age of 86 in Delhi on 11th June, 2016. Malhotra began his career in journalism at United Press of India after graduating from Punjab University. Inder Malhotra has authored several books including 'Indira Gandhi : A Personal and Political Biography (1989)', and 'Dynasties of India and Beyond (2003)'. He was also working on the book 'Indian Security: Past, Present and Future' which remains unfinished.

question: The first Indian satellite, Aryabhatta, was launched in the year

en.content: The first Indian satellite, Aryabhatta, was launched in the year
en.explanation: Aryabhatta Satellite was launched on 19th April, 1975, with weight of 360 kg. It was launched by Soviet Intercosmos rocket. The objectives of this project were to indigenously design and fabricate a space-worthy satellite system and evaluate its performance in orbit.

question: The SAARC Secretariat is located at

en.content: The SAARC Secretariat is located at
en.explanation: The SAARC Secretariat is located in Kathmandu, Nepal. It was established in the year 1985. It coordinates and monitors implementation of activities, prepares for and services meetings, and serves as a channel of communication between the Association and its Member States as well as other regional organisations. Member countries of SAARC are India, Bhutan, Bangladesh, Afghanistan, Maldives, Nepal, Pakistan and Sri Lanka.

question: Who among the following is the author of the book 'Pakistan Paradox : Instability and Resilience'?

en.content: Who among the following is the author of the book 'Pakistan Paradox : Instability and Resilience'?
en.explanation:
The Pakistan Paradox by Christopher Jaffrelot, a redoubtable scholar on South Asia, reveals a country grappling with multiple dichotomies, most of which can be traced to separatist ideals espoused by the country's early leaders.

G Parthasarathy, an Indian economist authored the Book 'Economic reforms and Rural Development in India'.

Imran Khan, ex-cricketer of Pakistan and currently a politician, wrote many books. One of them is 'Warrior Race : A Journey Through the Land of Tribal Pathan'. Imran Khan became 22nd Prime Minister of Pakistan.

Mamnoon Hussain is the 12th (2013-2018) President of Pakistan.

options.content: UN70 and UN Peacekeeping : Past, Present and Future

en.explanation: The theme of International Day of UN Peacekeepers, 2015, was 'UN70 and UN Peacekeeping: Past, Present and Future.' UN Peacekeepers day is celebrated on 29th May each year.
